code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut state = 0
mut token = ""

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    let is_nl = b == 10
    if is_nl
      if state == 3
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      state = 0
      token = ""
    else if is_ws
      if state == 1
        state = 2
      else if state == 3
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
        state = 4
      end
    else
      if state == 0
        state = 1
      else if state == 2
        state = 3
        token = "#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      else if state == 3
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if state == 3
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
  when None
    ()
  end
end

print("sum=#{sum}")
